message:
fix: resolve startup self-deadlock and harden infra config isolation

- Move acquire_runtime_mailbox_activity_locks() after startup probes in
  run_http, run_http_with_tui, and run_stdio to prevent the process from
  deadlocking against its own shared flock when probe_integrity attempts
  an exclusive lock on the same activity lockfile.

- Add infra_env_value() that skips project-local .env for DATABASE_URL
  and STORAGE_ROOT, preventing a random repo's .env from silently
  repointing Agent Mail at the wrong database.

- Derive default database_url from the resolved storage_root instead of
  hardcoding a relative path, keeping DB pool config aligned with core
  config resolution.

Closes #82

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
